title: Cat Teaser Pet Kitten Toy - Bell, Stick, Feather, Ball & Mice - Interactive Play Toy
features: Engaging Play: Cat toys with bells capture your cat's attention, encouraging active play by stimulating their natural hunting instincts with sound and movement.

Package Includes: 1 x Pet Toy Wood Stick
